---
title: "Guias"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

---
title: "GUÍA DE INSTALACIÓN Y MANEJO DE ROS2 JAZZY"
author: "Dayely Alejandra Gutierrez Llanten"
affiliation: "The University"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    css: styles.css 
---
{{< include plan.qmd >}}
{{< include instalar_ros2.qmd >}}
{{< include workspace.qmd >}}
{{< include conceptos_basicos.qmd >}}
{{< include paquete.qmd >}}
{{< include packages.qmd >}}
{{< include primer_nodo.qmd >}}
{{< include publisher.qmd >}}
{{< include subscriber.qmd >}}
{{< include turtlesim.qmd >}}

{{< include example_chase_turtle.qmd >}}
{{< include chase_turtle.qmd >}}
